CompletionConfig.description: Settings for the Vim-prefix autocomplete extension.

enabled.description: Enable autocomplete for open Neovim splits.

NvimCoreConfig.description: Settings for the main Neovim integration extension.

injectEditorState.description: Inject current editor state (splits, cursor) into each prompt.

showConnectionMessages.description: Show Neovim connection status messages in chat.

UndoConfig.description: Settings for the persistent undo extension.

enabled.description: Enable hooks that update Neovim persistent undo files after edit/write tools.
